description: Convert a .pptx to PDF via headless LibreOffice (soffice --headless --convert-to pdf). Read-only — the deck is not modified; the PDF lands under record_store. The vendored soffice.py auto-applies an LD_PRELOAD socket shim for sandboxed VMs where AF_UNIX is blocked.
rules: read-only — never writes back to PPTX_FILE
requires the soffice (LibreOffice) binary on PATH; degrades gracefully when absent
rendered PDF is written to render.pdf under record_store
usage: Set PPTX_FILE (path to a .pptx). Output: render.pdf. Pipe through pdftoppm for per-slide JPEGs if needed.
limitation: Needs LibreOffice installed; rendering fidelity depends on the soffice version and available fonts. No image conversion (use pdftoppm separately) — this perk stops at the PDF.
